zh.text: 总有一些话 来不及说了
总有一个人 是心口的朱砂
想起那些话 那些傻 眼泪落下
只留一句 你现在好吗
如果爱忘了 泪不想落下
那些幸福啊 让她替我到达
如果爱懂了 承诺的代价
不能给我的 请完整给她
总有些牵挂 旧的像伤疤
越是不碰它 越隐隐的痛在那
想你的脸颊 你的发 我不害怕
就让时间 给我们回答
如果爱忘了 泪不想落下
那些幸福啊 让她替我到达
如果爱懂了 承诺的代价
不能给我的 请完整给她
我说我忘了 不痛了
那是因为太爱太懂了
笑了 原谅了 为你也值得
用你的快乐 告诉我
现在放开双手是对的
别管我多 舍不得
如果爱忘了 就放他走吧
那些幸福啊 让她替我到达
如果爱懂了 承诺的代价
不能给我的 请完整给她
如果爱忘了 你还记得吗

en.text: There are always words that were never said in time
There is always one person, the cinnabar mark on my heart
When I remember those words, those foolish moments, tears fall
Only one sentence remains: are you well now
If love forgets, I do not want my tears to fall
Let those happinesses reach her in my place
If love has understood, the price of promises
What you cannot give me, please give her in full
There are always old concerns, like scars
The less I touch them, the more they ache faintly there
Your cheeks, your hair, when I think of them, I am not afraid
Let time answer for us
If love forgets, I do not want my tears to fall
Let those happinesses reach her in my place
If love has understood, the price of promises
What you cannot give me, please give her in full
I said I forgot, that it no longer hurts
That is because I loved too deeply and understood too much
I smiled, forgave, and for you it is still worth it
Use your happiness to tell me
That letting go now is the right thing
No matter how reluctant I am
If love forgets, then let it go
Let those happinesses reach her in my place
If love has understood, the price of promises
What you cannot give me, please give her in full
If love forgets, do you still remember
